result.stderr:
dotnet-gcmon 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Maoni Stephens

  -n, --processName         The process name for which the GC Monitoring will
                            take place for - the first process is chosen if
                            there are multiple. Either this parameter or -p must
                            be passed for the monitoring to begin.

  -p, --processId           The process id for which the GC Monitoring will take
                            place for. Either this parameter or -n must be
                            passed for the monitoring to begin.

  -c, --configPath          The path to the YAML columns configuration file used
                            during the session. If no path is specified, the
                            default configuration is overwritten by the selected
                            column in the prompt.

  -g, --createConfigPath    The path of the YAML configuration file to be
                            generated based on the colums selection available in
                            the command prompt.

  -?, --\?                  Display Help.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

options.description: The path to the YAML columns configuration file used during the session. If no path is specified, the default configuration is overwritten by the selected column in the prompt.
The path of the YAML configuration file to be generated based on the colums selection available in the command prompt.
The process id for which the GC Monitoring will take place for. Either this parameter or -n must be passed for the monitoring to begin.
The process name for which the GC Monitoring will take place for - the first process is chosen if there are multiple. Either this parameter or -p must be passed for the monitoring to begin.
